Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x777B "PACMAN-ARLASOFT-777B" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Pacman v1.0 (Arlasoft - 2022).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Removed the calls at $77B1 (JSR $768E) and $7A0C (JSR $75AD) to remove disk access from the game (for high score loading and saving).
